allowed_publishers.description: A list of ARNs for signing profiles that are allowed to sign the code package.

config_id.description: The unique identifier of the code signing configuration.

description.description: A brief description of the code signing configuration.

id.description: The ID of the code signing configuration.

last_modified.description: The date and time when the code signing configuration was last modified.

policies.description: Policies that define what to do with untrusted artifacts during deployment.
